chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-2119 of 2022 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority. 1. For order on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA No.12636/2022 3. For hearing of CMA No.14256/2022 4. For hearing of CMA No.9571/2022 5. For hearing of main case. 07.08.2025. Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar, AAG. ---------------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2022 which is over 03 years old. It was last taken up on 27.10.2022 which is over 03 years ago and since then learned counsel for the petitioner has not made any effort to pursue this petition. Today learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition which is hereby dismissed on account of non-prosecution alongwith all pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
